mapper.sql: id, resume_id, interview_id, candidate_name, position_id, position_name, salary, probation_period, entry_date, offer_valid_date, status, send_time, view_status, view_time, confirm_time, reject_reason, notify_hr_status, create_time, update_time, create_by, remark
mapper.insert: insert into offer (id, resume_id, interview_id, candidate_name, position_id, position_name, salary, probation_period, entry_date, offer_valid_date, status, send_time, view_status, view_time, confirm_time, reject_reason, notify_hr_status, create_by, remark) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{resumeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{interviewId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{candidateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{positionId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{positionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{probationPeriod,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{offerValidDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{viewStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{viewTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{rejectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notifyHrStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into offer
resume_id,
interview_id,
candidate_name,
position_id,
position_name,
salary,
probation_period,
entry_date,
offer_valid_date,
status,
send_time,
view_status,
view_time,
confirm_time,
reject_reason,
notify_hr_status,
create_by,
remark,
#{resumeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{interviewId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{candidateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{positionId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{positionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{salary,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{probationPeriod,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update offer
resume_id = #{resumeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
interview_id = #{interviewId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
candidate_name = #{candidateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
position_id = #{positionId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
position_name = #{positionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salary = #{salary,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
probation_period = #{probationPeriod,jdbcType=INTEGER},
entry_date = #{entryDate,jdbcType=DATE},
offer_valid_date = #{offerValidDate,jdbcType=DATE},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
send_time = #{sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
view_status = #{viewStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
view_time = #{viewTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
confirm_time = #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reject_reason = #{rejectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
notify_hr_status = #{notifyHrStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update offer set resume_id = #{resumeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, interview_id = #{interviewId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, candidate_name = #{candidateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, position_id = #{positionId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, position_name = #{positionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salary = #{salary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, probation_period = #{probationPeriod,jdbcType=INTEGER}, entry_date = #{entryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, offer_valid_date = #{offerValidDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, send_time = #{sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, view_status = #{viewStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, view_time = #{viewTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, confirm_time = #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notify_hr_status = #{notifyHrStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
from offer where resume_id = #{resumeId} limit 1

select
from offer where offer_valid_date <= #{date} and status = 1

select
from offer where entry_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} and status = 2
